notableEvents.label: Ke'Bryan Hayes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ke'Bryan Hayes grounds into a double play, third baseman Edmundo Sosa to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Alec Bohm. Tyler Stephenson out at 2nd. Ke'Bryan Hayes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: J.T. Realmuto reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Elly De La Cruz.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Trea Turner steals (7) 3rd base. Bryce Harper steals (3) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Bryson Stott GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryson Stott grounds into a double play, first baseman Sal Stewart to shortstop Elly De La Cruz. Edmundo Sosa out at 2nd. Bryson Stott out at 1st.
